treatment_information.treatment_response: Decreased frequency and severity of recurrences

treatment_timeline.event: Initial presentation with vesicular rash after sun exposure
Diagnosis of hydroa vacciniforme based on clinical features and histology
Initiation of photoprotection with sunscreens and vocational adjustment
Moderately severe flare after prolonged sun exposure

patient_outcome.recovery_timeline: Healing within 1-2 weeks with scar formation after each episode
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Working in construction with intermittent, short periods of sun exposure
